page_metadata.biotools__summary: Program written in C++ that constructs datasets from NCBI data (GenBank). This uses the megaphylogeny method to construct extremely large datasets, but is convenient for small ones too.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Program written in C++ that constructs datasets from NCBI data (GenBank). This uses the megaphylogeny method to construct extremely large datasets, but is convenient for small ones too.
